title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account, preferences, and notifications.

profile.title: Profile Information
profile.subtitle: Update your display name and contact details.
profile.emailReadOnly: Email is managed by your sign-in provider and cannot be changed here.
profile.error: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

appearance.themeSubtitle: Choose how the interface looks. System default follows your OS setting.
appearance.languageSubtitle: Switch the interface language. Changes apply immediately.

notifications.title: Email Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choose which events send an email to your account address. These settings take effect once email delivery is enabled.
notifications.measurementReviewed: My submitted measurement was reviewed or rejected
notifications.thresholdExceeded: A compliance threshold is exceeded at a station
notifications.incidentReported: A new disaster incident is reported
notifications.incidentStatusChanged: An incident status or severity changes
notifications.pinUsed: A registration PIN I created was used

dataPreferences.title: Data Preferences
dataPreferences.subtitle: Default filters and display settings applied across data modules.
